brand_identity.name: WM-Sauna
brand_identity.vibe: Minimalist Finnish Luxury, Warm, Serene, High-End Craftsmanship
brand_identity.target_audience: Polish homeowners, premium seekers, eco-conscious buyers

headings.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Product names

primary.description: Warm Gold Wood - Used for Primary Buttons, Highlights, Icons

secondary.description: Soft Black - Used for Headings, Footer, Strong Contrast Elements

background.description: Bone White / Off-White - Main background to reduce eye strain compared to pure white

accent.description: Metallic Gold - Used sparingly for thin lines, active states, and 'Premium' tags

buttons.primary: bg-[#C6A87C] text-white hover:bg-[#B09060] rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-bold transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1A1A1A] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-bold transition-all duration-300

cards.product: bg-white border border-black/5 hover:border-[#C6A87C]/30 transition-all duration-300 group cursor-pointer

inputs.default: bg-white border-black/10 focus:border-[#C6A87C] rounded-none h-12 px-4 transition-colors

hero.alt: Luxury wooden sauna interior with panoramic nature view

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Montserrat' for all headings and 'Lato' for body text. Import them from Google Fonts.
Implement a 'Sticky' header that becomes glassmorphic on scroll.
The 'Calculator' is the core feature. Make it a multi-step wizard with smooth transitions (Framer Motion). Steps: Size -> Wood Type -> Heater -> Extras -> Summary.
Use the 'Bento Grid' layout for the 'Nasze realizacje' (Gallery) section.
Ensure the 'Contact' section has a working form layout and a placeholder for Google Maps.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons, but style them with the Primary Gold color (#C6A87C).
For the 'In Stock' section, use a clean card layout with a 'Dostępne od ręki' (Available Now) badge.
Implement a language toggle (PL/EN/RU) in the navbar.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states that shift color or lift slightly.

Do NOT use rounded corners (rounded-none) for buttons and inputs to maintain the 'Premium/Architectural' feel. Use 'rounded-lg' only for inner cards if absolutely necessary for softness, but prefer sharp edges.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
